2 #ifndef STANDARDDIVKGRADTWOPOINTSSERVICE_H
3 #define STANDARDDIVKGRADTWOPOINTSSERVICE_H
4 
5 #include <arcane/SharedVariable.h>
6 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
9 
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/DiscreteOperatorProperty.h"
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/IDivKGradDiscreteOperator.h"
12 
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/TensorAlgebra.h"
14 
15 #include "StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActive_axl.h"
16 
17 using namespace Arcane;
18 
25 class StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveService :
26  public IDivKGradDiscreteOperator,
27  public ArcaneStandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveObject {
28 public:
30  StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveService(const ServiceBuildInfo& sbi) :
31  ArcaneStandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveObject(sbi),
32  m_status(DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_NONE),
33  m_geometry_service(NULL),
34  m_options(DiscreteOperatorProperty::O_NONE),
35  m_properties(DiscreteOperatorProperty::P_NONE)
36  {
37  //
38  }
39 
41  virtual ~StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveService()
42  {
43  // Delete m_face group
44  }
45 
47  virtual VersionInfo versionInfo() const
48  {
49  return VersionInfo(1, 0, 0);
50  }
51 
52 public:
54  void init();
55 
56  void prepare(IMesh * mesh,
57  CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * cell_coefficients,
58  CoefficientArrayT<Face> * face_coefficients);
59 
61  ARCANE_DEPRECATED void prepare(const FaceGroup& internal_faces,
62  const FaceGroup& boundary_faces,
63  FaceGroup& c_internal_faces,
64  FaceGroup& cf_internal_faces,
65  CoefficientArrayT<Cell>* cell_coefficients,
66  CoefficientArrayT<Face>* face_coefficients);
67 
69  void finalize();
70 
72  inline Integer getCellGeometricProperties() {
73  return IGeometryProperty::PCenter;
74  }
76  inline Integer getFaceGeometricProperties() {
77  return (IGeometryProperty::PCenter | IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
78  }
79 
81  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal& k);
83  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3& k);
85  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3x3& k);
86 
87  // Shared variables
89  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal& k);
91  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3& k);
93  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3x3& k);
94 
95  inline bool twoPointBoundary()
96  {
97  return true;
98  }
99 
100 public:
102  inline const FaceGroup& faces() const
103  {
104  return m_faces;
105  }
107  inline const CellGroup& cells() const
108  {
109  return m_cells;
110  }
112  inline const FaceGroup& boundaryFaces() const
113  {
114  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
115  ("Boundary face group has not been computed/defined") );
116  return m_boundary_faces;
117  }
119  inline const FaceGroup& internalFaces() const
120  {
121  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
122  ("Internal face group has not been computed/defined") );
123  return m_internal_faces;
124  }
126  inline const FaceGroup& cInternalFaces() const
127  {
128  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
129  ("CInternal face group has not been computed/defined") );
130  return m_c_internal_faces;
131  }
133  inline const FaceGroup& cfInternalFaces() const
134  {
135  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
136  ("CFInternal face group has not been computed/defined") );
137  return m_cf_internal_faces;
138  }
140  const Integer & status() const
141  {
142  return m_status;
143  }
144 
145 private:
146  Integer m_status;
147 
148  // Geometry service
149  IGeometryMng* m_geometry_service;
150 
151  // Status flags
152  Integer m_options;
153  Integer m_properties;
154 
155  // Prepared flag
156  bool m_prepared;
157 
158  // Faces group
159  FaceGroup m_faces;
160  // Cells group
161  CellGroup m_cells;
162  // Faces whose flux stencil contains cell unknowns only
163  FaceGroup m_internal_faces;
164  // Boundary faces group
165  FaceGroup m_boundary_faces;
166  // Internal faces whose stencil contains cell unknowns only
167  FaceGroup m_c_internal_faces;
168  // Internal faces whose stencil contains both cells and face unknowns
169  FaceGroup m_cf_internal_faces;
170 
171  // Cell group name
172  String m_cells_group_name;
173  // Face group name
174  String m_faces_group_name;
175 
176  // Cell coefficients
177  CoefficientArrayT<Cell>* m_cell_coefficients;
178  // Face coefficients
179  CoefficientArrayT<Face>* m_face_coefficients;
180 
181  // Object ownership, for backward compatibility only
182  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Cell> > m_cell_ownership;
183  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Face> > m_face_ownership;
184 
185  template<typename VariableTypeT>
186  void _form_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & k);
187 };
188 
189 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
190 
191 template<typename VariableTypeT>
192 void StandardDivKGradTwoPointsActiveService::_form_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & k)
193 {
194  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
195  ("Operator not prepared") );
196 
197  typedef typename VariableTraitsT<VariableTypeT>::DataType DiffusionType;
198 
199  // Retrieve geometrical properties
200  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
201  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_normals = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
202 
203  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& c_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_cells, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
204 
205  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_internal_faces) {
206  const Face& F = *iF;
207 
208  // Retrieve information
209  const Cell& T0 = F.backCell();
210  const Cell& T1 = F.frontCell();
211 
212  const Real3& nF = f_normals[F];
213 
214  const Real3& C0 = c_centers[T0];
215  const Real3& C1 = c_centers[T1];
216  const Real3& CF = f_centers[F];
217 
218  Real3 s0F = CF - C0;
219  Real3 s1F = CF - C1;
220 
221  const DiffusionType & k0 = k[T0];
222  const DiffusionType & k1 = k[T1];
223 
224  //K gradP.n = gradP.Kn = ||Kn|| dP/dKn_uni
225  const Real3 Kn0 = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k0, nF);
226  const Real Kn0_norm = Kn0.abs();
227  const Real3 Kn0_uni = Kn0/Kn0_norm;
228  Real d0F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s0F,Kn0_uni));
229  Real t0 = Kn0_norm/d0F;
230 
231  const Real3 Kn1 = DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k1, nF);
232  const Real Kn1_norm = Kn1.abs();
233  const Real3 Kn1_uni = Kn1/Kn1_norm;
234  Real d1F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s1F,Kn1_uni));
235  Real t1 = Kn1_norm/d1F;
236 
237  // Compute transmissivities
238  Real tau = math::abs(t0 + t1) ? (t0 * t1 / (t0 + t1)) : 0;
239 
240  StencilFluxCoeffType tau_F = m_cell_coefficients->coefficients(F);
241  tau_F[0] = tau;
242  tau_F[1] = -tau;
243  }
244 
245 
246  // Boundary faces
247  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_boundary_faces) {
248 
249  const Face& F = *iF;
250 
251  // Retrieve information
252  const Cell& T0 = F.boundaryCell();
253 
254  const Real3& nF = f_normals[F];
255 
256  const Real3& C0 = c_centers[T0];
257  const Real3& CF = f_centers[F];
258  const Real3 s0F = CF - C0;
259 
260  Real d0F2 = math::abs(math::scaMul(s0F, nF));
261 
262  const DiffusionType & k0 = k[T0];
263 
264  // Compute transmissivities
265  Real tau = math::scaMul(nF, DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k0, nF)) / d0F2;
266 
267  StencilFluxCoeffType c_tau_F = m_cell_coefficients->coefficients(F);
268  StencilFluxCoeffType f_tau_F = m_face_coefficients->coefficients(F);
269 
270  c_tau_F[0] = tau;
271  f_tau_F[0] = -tau;
272  }
273 }
274 
275 #endif
